config.negative_definition: all accepted gallery solutions from other tasks
config.positive_definition: accepted gallery solution from the same DTA task, excluding the query method
primary_contrasts: validation-selected combined product cost - fixed combined product costs
config.representation_policy: one shared frozen Euclidean encoder; cells vary only geometry, path object, and method aggregation
config.split_policy: disjoint train/query/gallery methods within every task
